elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: AD 1411 - Pilgrimage of Antonio Mannini, a Florentine merchant. (The Italian MS. gives a very interesting and accurate account of the Island and the pilgrimage. It professes to be an exact copy of a letter written by the pilgrim at Dublin, 25th February, 1411)
